note: Single source of truth for death copy: the death screen and the M8 gallery both read this registry. Room JSON triggers a death by id alone; inline text there is only a fallback for unregistered ids.

deaths.title: Locally Grounded
deaths.text: You open the case and grab the first component that looks optional. The Uninterruptible Power Supply interprets this as an interruption and files its objection directly through your elbows. Rated #1 in surge protection, four years running.

deaths.title: Legacy Infrastructure
deaths.text: You pull the bottom box. Above it, four CRT monitors you kept as backups — for a technology that no longer exists — finally see use. As ordnance. The coroner's report will say 'legacy infrastructure,' and for once the paperwork will be accurate.

deaths.title: 100% Packet Loss
deaths.text: You step into Main Street without looking. Statistically, this road carries one vehicle per hour. You have just met the hour. The town's entire traffic, delivered in a single packet, and you were standing on the route. In your own postmortem, you will be listed as the single point of failure.
